page: Microsoft Azure EC20ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECADSv5 server family. Powered by an AMD processor with x86_64 architecture, this server features 20 dedicated vCPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration includes 160.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

For local data requirements, the instance is equipped with 768 GB of local storage. It is also Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. The server does not include any graphics processing units and does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the memory allocation of 8.0 GB per vCPU and the presence of local storage, the EC20ads_v5 is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is suitable for database hosting, in-memory caching, and data processing tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities, making it a resource-dense option for enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure EC20ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine within the ECADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 160.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The server is equipped with 768 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it lacks GPU resources and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, and data processing workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and a high memory-to-core ratio.
